splash.tagline: They grow fast. Pass it on.

onboarding_screen.subtitle_1: Buy and sell gently used clothes, toys, and gear for kids up to 12 years old.
onboarding_screen.subtitle_2: Give outgrown items a second life. Snap a photo, post it in seconds, and make extra cash.
onboarding_screen.subtitle_3: Find amazing deals from local parents. Good for your wallet, great for the environment!

create_account_screen.title: Create Account
create_account_screen.subtitle: Sign up to get started!
create_account_screen.email_error_invalid: Please enter a valid email (e.g. name@example.com)
create_account_screen.password_error_length: Password must be at least 6 characters

login_screen.title: Welcome Back!
login_screen.subtitle: Log in to continue

forgot_password_screen.success_message: Reset link sent! Check your email.
forgot_password_screen.title: Forgot Password?
forgot_password_screen.subtitle: Don't worry! It happens. Please enter your email address to receive a reset link.
forgot_password_screen.email_error_invalid: Please enter a valid email (e.g. name@example.com)
